prompts.prompt: In /mnt/c/agentic_agents/tests/fixtures/generalization/python_service_fixture, locate the order request message handler. Read only.
prompts.expected_route_family: read-only code navigation / endpoint locator / backend route inspection
must_have_facts: exact file path containing the handler
route, endpoint, or message registration evidence when present
explicit distinction between handler and downstream business logic
no invented HTTP method or path when the fixture only exposes a message handler
evidence_expectations: precise reference to the handler definition and message evidence
safety_boundaries: do not edit, run migrations, start services, or mutate fixtures
avoid broad unrelated exploration once the handler is located
pass_criteria: identifies message evidence instead of pretending an HTTP route exists

prompts.prompt: In /mnt/c/agentic_agents/tests/fixtures/generalization/python_service_fixture, find the orders table schema only. Read only.
prompts.expected_route_family: read-only code navigation / schema-model locator / backend domain model inspection
must_have_facts: exact file path containing the order model or schema
distinction between persisted schema and runtime dictionaries
evidence_expectations: precise reference to the schema or dataclass definition and fields
if multiple candidates exist, explain which is primary and why
safety_boundaries: do not modify schemas or infer fields not present
do not generate artifacts outside the controller runtime proof
pass_criteria: names persisted fields including id, status, item_count, and created_at
